thesis: Acquisition odds rose from low baseline after credible reports of preliminary buyer interest, but evidence still indicates very early-stage exploration with no confirmed process or financing path. PayPal’s ongoing standalone strategy actions and asset-level partnerships make a full-company deal plausible but not yet likely.
method: Probability is a conservative base-rate estimate updated by weighting recency and credibility of corroborated reports, then discounting unverified rumor-stage signals and execution constraints.

evidence.signal: Reuters reports (citing Bloomberg) that Stripe is considering acquiring all or parts of PayPal; both parties declined comment and Reuters could not independently verify.
Reuters reports Bloomberg claim that PayPal has held meetings with banks amid unsolicited interest; report says interest is preliminary and may not lead to a transaction.
Reuters: PayPal replaced its CEO after weak outlook and strategy reset commentary, increasing strategic optionality but also signaling operational turbulence.
Reuters: PayPal renewed and expanded KKR BNPL receivables partnership, indicating continued execution of standalone asset-monetization strategy.
PayPal Investor Day laid out multi-year standalone growth targets and platform strategy, which is generally inconsistent with an active sale process at that time.
